info.name: Hookdeck Metrics API
info.description:
Query aggregated metrics for events, requests, and attempts — success counts, failure counts, response time, throughput, and SLA bands grouped by source, destination, or connection.

Contact Support:
 Name: Hookdeck Support
 Email: info@hookdeck.com

request.description: Query aggregated request metrics with time-based grouping and filtering

item.name: Query event metrics grouped by individual issue

request.description: Returns metrics for events broken down by individual issue IDs. Uses arrayJoin to create one row per issue per event, enabling per-issue analytics. Useful for tracking which issues affect the most events over time.
